name: Depressed Adventurer
description:
He was the prince of Gam before the coup that killed his family and best friend Elizabeth, small in stature and very closed off. he inherited his grandfather's magical prowess, and often becomes unresponsive when returning to memories of his past. He dreams of the day when he can retake his kingdom and avenge his family. He has asthma, but can usually hide it well.

please comment so i know how to improve it :)
creator: brickmaster34
